name: Breakpoint Buddy Duck
tagline: Stares at your stack trace so you don't have to.
description: A calm companion for stepping through tangled code paths and suspicious assumptions.

name: Null Pointer Sentinel
tagline: Guards your code from void-related drama.
description: Keeps a vigilant beak on nullable values and missing checks in critical logic.

name: Socratic Squeaker
tagline: Answers every question with a better question.
description: Ideal for design reviews where certainty is suspicious and assumptions need sunlight.

name: Existential Quacker
description: Prompts late-night contemplation about system boundaries, meaning, and side effects.

name: Captain Quackbeard
tagline: Steers your sprint through stormy seas.
description: A seasoned captain duck for teams navigating deadlines, regressions, and rogue requirements.

name: Harbor Master Duck
tagline: Dock your features safely before release.
description: Ensures every release enters harbor with logs reviewed and checklists complete.

name: Zen Floatie
description: Brings tranquil energy to tense debug sessions and pre-demo moments.

name: Mindful Merge Duck
tagline: Merge conflict? Take one mindful quack.
description: Encourages slow breathing and small, reversible commits during integration stress.

name: Nevermore Noir Duck
tagline: Quoth the duck: ship once, ship right.
description: A dramatic collector's duck for gothic code reviews and poetic commit messages.

name: Moonlight Monocle Duck
tagline: Elegance for your most refined refactors.
description: A distinguished duck that demands clean abstractions and tasteful naming.
